note: B2 (PLAN_LEAN_IMPORT.md §8.2): append-only admission records for the import driver's inline vocabulary mining. `word` is the macro name; the live table is rebuilt from these records at wave start (import_driver.load_macro_table). dl_before/dl_after are mdl_macros.macro_admission_decision's corpus-DL currency at admission time; witnesses are authored Mathlib declarations (every import reading is exogenous).
